# 二叉树的博客

> 个人技术记录、工程排障和系统实践日志

Canonical site: https://www.spiritysdx.top/
Primary language: zh-CN

## Machine-readable indexes

- Sitemap: https://www.spiritysdx.top/sitemap.xml
- RSS feed: https://www.spiritysdx.top/index.xml
- Search JSON: https://www.spiritysdx.top/index.json
- AI content index: https://www.spiritysdx.top/ai-index.json
- MCP discovery metadata: https://www.spiritysdx.top/.well-known/mcp.json

## Content policy

This site publishes public technical notes, troubleshooting records, and engineering practice logs. Public pages may be indexed, summarized, and cited by search engines, AI assistants, and MCP-aware clients when attribution links back to the canonical URL.
